prompt:
Ultra-realistic retro editorial magazine cover featuring a glamorous Korean woman in a 1970s deep-dive disco era look: wide-lapel ivory satin blazer unbuttoned over a beaded fringe halter top, super-flared high-waist cream trousers with a bold snakeskin waist belt, and strappy gold platform heels. Voluminous dark blown-out Farrah Fawcett-style feathered waves. Warm golden-tan skin, bronzed shimmer makeup, earthy brown-peach lip gloss, thick mascara feathered lashes. Oversized gold hoop earrings, long pendant layered chains, bold cocktail ring. Background: vintage 1970s warm sepia-orange studio — geometric wallpaper, warm tungsten light, film grain and soft lens vignette overlay, slight chromatic aberration. "VOGUE" in groovy vintage serif masthead with period-appropriate layout typography. 85mm vintage lens simulation, ultra-detailed satin sheen, photorealistic 70s-grain skin, 8K. 

Negative: modern clean look, cold tones, cartoon, anime, watermark, blurry.1744x2336
